response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed video and identified on-screen text 'イッツミー...!' (It's me...!). Performed web search '\"It's me...!\" Inugami Korone lyrics' but did not find specific lyrics. Set lyrics fields to null. Broken down video into scenes based on title card, performance segments, and black screen.
response.global_summary: A 6th-anniversary celebration video featuring a puppet performance of Inugami Korone. The video features a song titled 'It's me...!', performed by Inugami Korone, with changing background scenes.

scenes.description: Title card '6周年' (6th Anniversary) and 'イッツミー' (It's me). No vocals.
Puppet Inugami Korone starts singing and performing the song 'It's me...!' against various backgrounds.
Puppet Inugami Korone and other plushies continue the song 'It's me...!'.
